time_ms,beat_position,notes,placement_type,note_type,confidence,instrument 0.0,1.0,1000,4,2,0.95,kick 125.0,1.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 250.0,1.5,0010,4,3,0.88,snare 375.0,1.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 500.0,2.0,2000,4,2,1.0,bass 625.0,2.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 750.0,2.5,0100,4,3,0.82,snare 875.0,2.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1000.0,3.0,3001,4,2,0.91,kick 1125.0,3.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1250.0,3.5,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1375.0,3.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1500.0,4.0,0000,0,2,1.0,unknown 1625.0,4.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1750.0,4.5,0010,4,3,0.79,snare 1875.0,4.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 2000.0,5.0,",",-1,-1,1.0,separator 201.36,329.07,421.95,665.76,932.79,1048.89,1164.99,1281.09,1408.80,1629.39,1815.15,2012.52,2128.62,2209.89,2372.43,2488.53,2593.02,2836.83,2964.54,3092.24,3324.44,3579.86,3800.45,3916.55,4531.88,4636.37,4775.69,4903.40,5019.50,5112.38,5263.31,5495.51,5600.00,5727.71,5867.03,6099.23,6215.33,6459.14,6702.95,6819.05,6946.76,7051.25,7178.96,7422.77,7666.58,8026.49,8142.59,8363.17,8630.20,8734.69,8862.40,8978.50,9094.60,9338.41,9570.61,9709.93,9826.03,9953.74,10058.23,10185.94,10290.43,10534.24,10789.66,11021.86,11277.28,11497.87,11555.92,12217.69,12426.67,12693.70,12833.02,12937.51,13065.22,13192.93,13425.12,13564.44,13796.64,13912.74,14156.55,14400.36,14597.73,14748.66,14864.76,15108.57,15352.38,15723.90,15793.56,16048.98,16327.62,16571.43,16687.53,16803.63,17047.44,17291.25,17407.35,17523.45,17604.72,17767.26,17883.36,17987.85,18231.66,18359.37,18487.07,18719.27,18974.69,19183.67,19334.60,19915.10
